examples: Draw a dress and a prawn.
Someone says that old Trafford is like a cathedral, populated by what Roy Keane called the "prawn sandwich" brigade.
They saw that the male cleaner fish — even in this unfamiliar lab setting — would punish or chase away the female fish if the females ate a prawn.
Their food is coloured with crushed prawn shells, part of the salmon's diet in the wild.
The 15m (49.2ft) prawn trawler Amethyst hit rocks off the Point of Sleat at about 05:00.
